ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot looking at a clock, specifically at the time of nine o'clock. The robot's left arm will point at the clock face, while the right arm remains relaxed at its side.  The sequence will focus on the left arm's movement, emphasizing the pointing gesture. The movements are designed to be smooth and deliberate, reflecting a thoughtful action.

frames.beat: left arm lifts, hand points outward with purpose
the finger extends further, indicating the time
the arm reaches its peak, a steady nine o'clock
the arm lowers slightly, the time confirmed
